What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
S
Sarah M.

Kansas City Roofing Company was fantastic! We had a leak in our Waldo home after a bad storm, and they came out quickly to assess the damage and provide a fair quote. The repair was done efficiently and professionally. Highly recommend!

D
David K.

I hired Kansas City Roofing Company for gutter cleaning, and they did a thorough job. They were on time, courteous, and left my property clean. My only minor complaint is that scheduling took a little longer than I expected.

E
Emily R.

We recently had our roof replaced by Kansas City Roofing Company, and we couldn't be happier with the results. The team was professional, efficient, and the new roof looks great. They even helped us choose the right shingles to match our Brookside home's style!

J
John S.

After a severe hailstorm, our roof was badly damaged. Kansas City Roofing Company responded quickly and helped us navigate the insurance claim process. The repairs were done promptly and professionally. I'm very grateful for their assistance.

Additional Roofer Services

Roof Repair Roof Replacement Roof Inspection Gutter Services

Kansas City Roofing Company — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every roofer project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Kansas City Roofing Company Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific roofer needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Kansas City & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Kansas City, MO and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Overland Park Olathe Lee's Summit Kansas City Independence Blue Springs Gladstone Shawnee
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our roofer services.

How do I know if I need a roof repair?

Common signs include water stains on your ceiling, missing or damaged shingles, and visible leaks. If you suspect any roof damage, it's best to call us for an inspection.

How long does a typical roof repair take?

The duration of a roof repair depends on the extent of the damage. Minor repairs can often be completed in a day, while more extensive repairs may take longer.

Do you offer emergency roof repair services?

Yes, we provide 24/7 emergency roof repair services to address urgent situations like severe leaks caused by storms.

Built on Kansas City Values

Protect your home with the best roofing services in Kansas City. Contact us now for a free, no-obligation quote.

Let's Begin →
